title: Composio plugin is governed, disabled by default and HML-gated
summary: Composio must be treated as a high-impact external connector that stays disabled in TEST, uses allowlists, blocks destructive actions, and requires human approval before any external action or write capability is enabled.
facts: Composio is an external connector with high impact.
TEST must remain disabled and dry-run only.
inferences: HML is required before any real external action is allowed.
decisions: Require human approval for write actions.
rollback: Disable the plugin and remove HML references if policy changes.
